title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 34
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about lost sports watch.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you found your sports watch? You looked worried earlier. || Man: Not at first. I searched the changing room because I remembered using it there, then checked the bus seat, but nobody had seen it. || Woman: So where did it turn up? || Man: My coach has just messaged me. [1]It is on the coach's desk[/1]. I must have left it there. I will collect it at lunch because I need it for training this afternoon. || Woman: Great. You can stop searching now and concentrate on the day.
items.question: Where is the sports watch?
items.explanation: The speaker says the sports watch is on the coach's desk.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about buying a birthday present.
items.audio_script: Girl: Did you buy a birthday present for my best friend? You said you were going into town after school. || Boy: Yes, but choosing took a while. I first considered a mug, because that seemed a safe choice. || Girl: What about some earrings? That might have been useful. || Boy: I looked at that, but it did not seem right. In the end, [2]I bought a sketchbook because she has started drawing every day[/2]. || Girl: That sounds thoughtful. I am sure it will be appreciated. || Boy: I hope so. I will wrap it this evening before tomorrow's party.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker says they bought a sketchbook because she has started drawing every day.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at the sports centre.
items.audio_script: Girl: What job are you doing at the sports centre this afternoon? I thought you were going to sell tickets. || Boy: That was yesterday's plan, but somebody finished it before lunch. || Girl: So will you clean the changing rooms instead? || Boy: No, the manager says that is not needed today. [3]I have to collect the used towels because the swimming lessons have just ended[/3]. || Girl: That sounds manageable, although you may be busy. || Boy: Yes, I want to finish before five because I promised to meet my friends afterwards nearby.
items.question: What job will the speaker do?
items.explanation: The speaker says they have to collect the used towels because the swimming lessons have just ended.

items.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on the camping weekend.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are you ready for the camping weekend tomorrow? I was checking what we have to bring, because I do not want to forget anything. || Man: I was going to pack a football. Do we need that? || Woman: No, it is not on the list. || Man: Perhaps I should take a cooking pot instead. || Woman: You can, but [4]everyone must bring a torch because the path to the tents is dark at night[/4]. || Man: Thanks for reminding me. I will put it in my bag tonight, so I am ready when we leave.
items.question: What must the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone must bring a torch because the path to the tents is dark at night.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still planning to go shopping tomorrow evening? I had already arranged everything for it. || Boy: I am afraid not. The shops close early and my computer is being repaired, so that plan will not work now. || Girl: We could play computer games instead. Would that be easier? || Boy: I thought about that, but I have a better idea. [5]Let us go to the cinema tomorrow evening instead[/5]. || Girl: Fine with me. Where shall we meet? || Boy: Meet me by the bus stop at four, and bring your student card in case they ask for it.
items.question: What will they do?
items.explanation: The speaker suggests that they go to the cinema tomorrow evening instead.

items.context: You hear two students talking about drama practice.
items.audio_script: Woman: Do you know where drama practice is being held today? I was going to the hall, where we usually meet. || Man: Do not go there. A sports event is using the hall and the classroom is too small, so the organiser changed the room. || Woman: I wondered whether it might be in the classroom. || Man: No, that is not right either. [6]We need to meet in the music room this afternoon[/6]. || Woman: Thanks for telling me. I would have waited in the wrong place. || Man: I will message the others too, so nobody misses the beginning.
items.question: Where will drama practice be held?
items.explanation: The speaker says they need to meet in the music room.

items.context: You hear two people checking a time.
items.audio_script: Girl: I am checking the time for today because I wrote down four o'clock, but I may have made a mistake. || Boy: Yes, that was the original time. I called this morning because I was not sure either. || Girl: Did they change it to half past four then? || Boy: No. [7]The receptionist moved it to half past four[/7], so we should plan around that. || Girl: Thanks. I will leave home earlier so I am not rushing. || Boy: Good idea. I will meet you outside ten minutes before it starts.
items.question: What time is the appointment?
items.explanation: The receptionist moved it to half past four.
